programme.title: Baal Veer

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Swapna Pari helps Baalveer and Manav to reach Santa Claus's dream. However, she warns Manav and Baal Veer not to sleep as this would seal the portal.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Baal Veer finds himself in a challenging situation, attempting to simultaneously hold up a heavy door and rouse Manav from an unintended sleep.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Dadi narrates the story of an evil witch who abducts children to magically turn them into animals. Soon, the story transforms into reality.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Bhayankar Pari tries to ruin Baal Veer's life. Meanwhile, Baal Veer avoids listening to a horrific story. Later, Touba Touba hatches an evil plan.

programme.title: Baal Veer
programme.desc: Bhayankar Pari makes multiple devices and calls upon all the witches. Meanwhile, the fairies call Baalveer for help in getting Dooba Dooba back to his natural form.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Roshan discovers a suspicious sack outside Madhavi and Bhide's house and shares her concerns with the Mahila Mandal. Is this the start of a new problem?

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Rohan finds a mysterious sack outside Madhavi and Bhide's house. Later, Rohan informs the Mahila Mandal about the incident.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Excitement spreads through the colony as Bhide distributes jackfruit to everyone, a gift from his uncle's farm. However, the women find themselves puzzled.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Gudi Padwa unites Gokuldham Colony in celebration. Soon, the Bhides boost the festive mood by preparing a variety of jackfruit dishes for the auspicious day.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide is taken aback as the tea he was sipping spills onto his clothes. Soon after, he reprimands Goya, who is responsible for the incident.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide reveals that he is unaware of the agenda for the day's meeting, irking Jethalal. Later, Bhide conveys to everyone that the initiative to gather the residents was Tapu Sena's idea.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: All the residents debate about the ideal fine for improper gifts. However, chaos breaks out in the midst of their discussion.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena visits each house in the society with a bowl full of letters that determine the recipient of all members' present.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: All Gokuldham are thinking about what gift they should give to their recipient. Bhide tries to find out about the recipient of Madhavi.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Natu Kaka and Bagha dress as Santa Claus and visit each member's house to collect the secret gifts. The party begins, and everyone is excited to see their gifts.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Before opening gifts, Bawri suggests that everyone should reveal their feelings regarding the presents, and the person with the least-liked present will have to pay a fine.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone is excited to open their gift. Jethalal seems upset after opening his present. Bhide becomes suspicious of Tapu when Sonu gets a heart-shaped cushion with a letter.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Anjali is dissatisfied with her gift, but Taarak urges her to accept it anyway. Meanwhile, Bhide discovers who gave Sonu a gift.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena presents a delightful idea that pleases Anjali and Taarak. Meanwhile, Jethalal receives a pleasant surprise.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: Abhijit and Sachin hear a woman's voice in the jungle and stop by to search for the woman. The next morning, they look for the same woman and find her brutally murdered.

programme.title: CID
programme.desc: The CID team rush out looking for Dr Salunkhe when he is reported missing. On realising who the suspect is, the team is divided into two groups in order to rescue Salunkhe and arrest the culprit.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Bhide laughs when Madhavi tells him about the ghost who haunts the society members. Daya asks Jethalal to help her prepare things for the ritual to keep the spirit away.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: All the society members grow concerned when seeing Bhide suffering from fever after he encountered the ghost in the night.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena get shocked after seeing the warning on the notice board and decide to ask Taarak for the truth.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis when Daya tells him that he will have to perform a small ritual to get rid of the ghost.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: All the men decide to patrol the society during the night to lookout for the ghost. However, things don't go as planned.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: The skeleton incident has major repercussions as it leaves Popatlal shaken. Later, he sits with the Hathi family.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Chaos ensues when Daya informs the men that they have decided to consult a tantric to get rid of the ghost.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu Sena and the parents run into producer Asit Kumar Modi at Disneyland. The members try to make Jethalal go on a dangerous ride.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Members of Gokuldham look for Bhide, the leader of the group, in Disneyland. Asit insists that the members should see the parade.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: While in Disneyland, all the members are excited and happy. The kids call Popatlal and reveal their wish to him.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya and Taarak miss Jethalal while he is away. Later, a mysterious lady arrives in Gokuldham looking for Jethalal.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya bumps into Gulabo, a 'Kashmiri' woman who claims that she is trying to find her husband. Later, she invites Gulabo to her home.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Daya is in a state of shock and Gulabo consoles her by saying that this is nobody's fault. Daya hesitates to break the news to her father-in-law and introduces Gulabo as her friend.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Panic occurs in Gokuldham and brings everyone into a state of shock when Daya informs them that Gulabo claims to be Jethalal's first wife.

programme.desc: Bhide is excited to be able to spend his Sunday with his family, enjoying Kothimbir Vadi. He eventually becomes upset when his excitement is ruined unexpectedly.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone in Gokuldham becomes worried when they have no news of Abdul. They organise a search of his house and all the locations he usually visits.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Upon seeing debt collectors, everyone realises Abdul owes money and believes that he has been intentionally staying out of sight.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Everyone is counting on Inspector Pandey to find Abdul and bring him back. However, he returns empty-handed, with Abdul still missing.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Although the residents are relieved by Abdul's return, he chooses to hide his financial struggles and decides to sell his shop.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Dr Hathi observes that something has changed about Abdul's behaviour. The men of Gokuldham try to get to the bottom of the situation.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Abdul tries to offer a huge discount at his shop to fix his financial problems without telling the residents.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Jethalal asks about the performance of the shop during his absence. Abdul attempts to sell his merchandise as quickly as possible.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and his friends find Abdul's behaviour unusual and decide to investigate the mystery behind his recent actions.

programme.title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
programme.desc: Tapu and his friends install a listening device to monitor Abdul's activities, but they feel uneasy about their decision.

programme.desc: Everyone in the society is left speechless and worried after learning that Abdul intends to put his shop up for sale.

programme.desc: Everyone in Gokuldham feels worried when Abdul prepares to sell his shop and bids farewell during the festival.

programme.desc: Taarak and Jethalal visit a couple of advocates but are unable to find the right advocate. Later, Jethalal starts dreaming about the future and gets scared.
